title: Welcome to nayab.life — A New Space for Insight & News
excerpt: Announcing the launch of nayab.life: blog, articles, and psychotherapy news from Nayab Tahir.
author: Nayab Tahir
body:
I am delighted to introduce **nayab.life** — a companion to my clinical practice at [Voice Awareness Psychotherapy Services Inc.](https://www.voiceawareness.ca).

This site will share:

- Reflections and education on psychotherapy
- Articles on mental health, culture, and healing
- News and developments in the field

Clinical services, booking, and consultations remain available through Voice Awareness and Jane App. Thank you for visiting — I hope you find resources here that support your journey.
